data.name: Shop Mistress NTR
data.detailed_description:
◆ Story Overview

In a quiet border town, players will develop a special relationship with a kind-hearted shopkeeper who has long struggled with infertility.

◆ Game Overview

Shop Mistress NTR is a simulation/interaction game designed with simple controls — everything can be played using only the mouse.

The game blends exploration and progression elements. Players can accept monster-hunting quests at different times of day, earning rewards and using their money to enhance abilities or purchase special items. Some items unlock new interactions and help progress the story.

As the relationship with the shopkeeper deepens, more types of intimate scenes will be unlocked, gradually pushing the story toward its climax. The game features richly animated Live2D scenes, and all adult content is naturally unlocked through gameplay progression.

◆ Erotic Content

The game includes a variety of adult-themed animations, including but not limited to handjob, footjob, blowjob, and anal sex scenes.

data.short_description: Shop Mistress NTR is a casual adult simulation game where players develop a relationship with a shopkeeper to unlock various intimate scenes — ultimately helping her fulfill a long-held desire.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and Newer
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
